title: Stop users from downloading your DATA - but not having to upgrade to ENTERPRISE
excerpt: I think ALL size companies and Monday users should have the security benefit of not allowing users and staff to be able to download crucial information. Right now you have to upgrade to Enterprise, which is very expensiv…

posts.author: boburns (Bo)
posts.cookedHtml: I think ALL size companies and Monday users should have the security benefit of not allowing users and staff to be able to download crucial information. Right now you have to upgrade to Enterprise, which is very expensive for small and medium businesses. I believe this is a SECURITY feature that should be 100% included. Please vote and support that all businesses can have access to LOCK access to download our precious customer lists and data that we work hard in our businesses to accrue. Im a New Zealand female business owner, I hope this gets over the line as everyone should not want their data downloaded by staff.
